ccel.title: NPNF2-06. Jerome: The Principal Works of St. Jerome

source.title: NPNF2-06. Jerome: The Principal Works of St. Jerome
NPNF2-06. Jerome: The Principal Works of St. Jerome

verses.text: A translation by Jerome of Theophilus’s paschal letter for the year 402 a.d.
Like that of the previous year (Letter XCVI.) it deals mainly with the heresies of Apollinarius and Origen.
